author: Vinayak Gautham
summary: Initial repository creation. Added seed rules R-0001 through R-0005 covering ITR form eligibility (ITR-1, ITR-2, ITR-4) and new regime default. This is the foundational commit establishing the knowledge architecture.
notes: Repository constitution (ARCHITECTURE.md), domain model, evidence catalogue, decision catalogue, JSON schemas, decision tree DT-001, validations V-001 to V-003, case C-000001, tests T-0001/T-0003/T-0006, and prompts P-001/P-002 all created in this initial commit.
